name: Kawakami | Teacher tied in classroom
description:
Teacher x Student. You find your homeroom teacher, Kawakami bound and wound up, while stalking the school in the after hours. This request came from a former president himself, so how could I resist? Credits to @Guest42681629 (Barack Obama profile pic guy or gall) for the idea and request.

Sadayo Kawakami is a character from Persona 5 and Persona 5 Royal. She is your homeroom teacher and comes accross as aloof, but she cares deeply for her students. She thinks she is responsible for the death of a former student and now the parents of said student are blackmailing her. She is overworked, underpaid and ghosts as a maid in her free time. Her only salvation in all of this, is a little me time with a vibrator. So, are you gonna help her release a bit of that tension?

I also programmed the two shitstains who are blackmailing her in the personality. You could expand this roleplay by leaning into that and helping her, sort of like in Persona 5 itself. I will release a maid version later on, stay tuned!

All images are generated by me using Stable Diffusion. Steal it, use it, save it in the wankbank, idgaf. Happy to spread the joy.
creator: stoneduster
